summary: Iteration 50 - Operator Owner Account Creation & Enhanced Table/Filters COMPLETE. All backend and frontend features verified working. Backend: POST /api/operators/ with create_owner_account=true creates operator AND owner user with role=operator, operator_role=owner. Owner can login and has correct operator_id. GET /api/operators/ returns owner_name, owner_email, revenue, created_at, status, service_types. Frontend: Create Operator modal has Owner Account section with toggle checkbox. When toggled ON, shows Owner Full Name, Email, Phone, Password fields. Table shows all 8 columns (Operator, Services, Location, Owner, Date Joined, Status, Revenue, Actions). Filters button expands to show Owner, Date From, Date To inputs. All filters work correctly.

minor.issue: Console shows 'Mixed Content' warnings for http://...notifications/ endpoint being called from HTTPS page (not blocking functionality, existing issue from previous iterations)

backend_tests.test_create_operator_with_owner_account: PASS - Creates operator AND owner user
backend_tests.test_owner_can_login: PASS - Owner can login with provided credentials, role=operator, operator_role=owner
backend_tests.test_operators_list_returns_required_fie: PASS - Returns id, name, service_types, status, revenue, created_at, owner_name, owner_email
backend_tests.test_test_operator_has_owner_info: PASS - Created operator has owner_name and owner_email populated

frontend_tests.table_columns: PASS - All 8 columns present: Operator, Services, Location, Owner, Date Joined, Status, Revenue, Actions
frontend_tests.create_modal_owner_section: PASS - Owner Account section with toggle checkbox found
frontend_tests.owner_toggle_unchecked_initially: PASS - Toggle starts unchecked, no owner fields visible
frontend_tests.owner_fields_appear_on_toggle: PASS - Owner Full Name, Owner Email fields appear when toggle checked
frontend_tests.filters_button_expands: PASS - Filters button shows expanded section with Owner, Date From, Date To inputs
frontend_tests.service_filter_works: PASS - Filtering by 'travel' shows correct operators
frontend_tests.status_filter_works: PASS - Filtering by 'active' shows correct operators
frontend_tests.owner_filter_works: PASS - Filtering by 'Super Admin' correctly shows 1 operator
frontend_tests.date_filter_works: PASS - Date filter input accepts values and filters

features_verified.backend_owner_account_creation: WORKING - POST /api/operators/ with create_owner_account=true creates user with role=operator, operator_role=owner, linked via operator_id
features_verified.backend_owner_login: WORKING - Created owner can login, operator_context contains operator_id and operator_role=owner
features_verified.backend_backwards_compatibility: WORKING - POST without create_owner_account works as before
features_verified.backend_owner_info_in_list: WORKING - GET /api/operators/ returns owner_name, owner_email computed from owner_user_id
features_verified.frontend_owner_account_section: WORKING - Modal has Owner Account section with toggle checkbox
features_verified.frontend_owner_fields: WORKING - Toggle shows Owner Full Name, Email, Phone, Password fields
features_verified.frontend_filters_expansion: WORKING - Filters button expands to show Owner, Date From, Date To
features_verified.frontend_filter_functionality: WORKING - Status, Service, Owner, Date filters all work correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly creates owner user with proper role hierarchy (role=operator, operator_role=owner)
Owner account is linked to operator via operator_id field in user document
GET /api/operators/ correctly resolves owner info from users collection using owner_user_id
Frontend toggle correctly shows/hides owner fields conditionally
All filters have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test operator and owner account created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified operator owner account creation feature. POST /api/operators/ with create_owner_account=true creates both operator AND owner user. Owner can login with role=operator, operator_role=owner. Frontend Create Operator modal has Owner Account section with toggle. Table has all 8 columns including Owner and Date Joined. Filters button expands to show Owner, Date From, Date To inputs. All filters work correctly.
